title: Mock Test 50 - Sentence Transformation
description: Sentence Transformation নিয়ে ২০টি প্রশ্ন। Active ↔ Passive, Direct ↔ Indirect, Affirmative ↔ Negative, Simple ↔ Complex, Positive ↔ Comparative ↔ Superlative, Exclamatory ↔ Assertive transformation।

questions.question: Active: 'She writes a letter.' → Passive কী হবে?
options: A letter is written by her.
A letter was written by her.
A letter has been written by her.
A letter is being written by her.
questions.explanation: Present Indefinite → is/are + V3। 'A letter is written by her.'

questions.question: Active: 'He ate an apple.' → Passive কী হবে?
options: An apple is eaten by him.
An apple was eaten by him.
questions.explanation: Past Indefinite → was/were + V3। 'An apple was eaten by him.'

questions.question: Direct: 'He said, "I am busy."' → Indirect কী হবে?
options: He said that he is busy.
He said that he was busy.
He said that I am busy.
He said that I was busy.

questions.question: Direct: 'She said, "I will come."' → Indirect কী হবে?
options: She said that she will come.
She said that she would come.
She said that I will come.
She said that I would come.

questions.question: Affirmative: 'He is honest.' → Negative কী হবে?
Negative: 'I do not like tea.' → Affirmative কী হবে?
Positive: 'Rimi is as tall as Rina.' → Comparative?
options: Rimi is not as tall as Rina.

questions.question: Positive: 'No other girl is as beautiful as Mina.' → Superlative?
options: Mina is the most beautiful girl.

questions.question: Exclamatory: 'What a beautiful flower!' → Assertive?
options: What a beautiful flower it is!
questions.explanation: 'What a + adj + noun!' → 'It is a very + adj + noun.'

questions.question: Assertive: 'I wish I were a bird.' → Exclamatory?
options: How I wish I were a bird!

questions.question: Simple: 'He came here and sat down.' → Complex?
options: He came here to sit down.
He came here, and he sat down.
When he came here, he sat down.
questions.explanation: 'When he came here, he sat down.' (adverb clause)

questions.question: Complex: 'If you study, you will pass.' → Simple?
Active: 'The children are playing football.' → Passive?
options: Football is played by the children.
Football is being played by the children.
Football was played by the children.

questions.question: Active: 'She has written a novel.' → Passive?
options: A novel is written by her.
A novel was written by her.
A novel has been written by her.

questions.question: Fill: 'I said to him, "I know you."' → Indirect: 'I told him that I ___ him.'
Fill: 'He is too weak to walk.' → 'He is so weak that he ___ walk.'
Fill: 'Nobody could solve the problem.' (Affirmative)
options: Everybody failed to solve the problem.

questions.question: Fill: 'She said, "I am reading."' → 'She said that ___'
অনুবাদ (Transformation): 'মিমি রিমির চেয়ে লম্বা।' (Comparative → Positive)
options: Rimi is as tall as Mimi.
Rimi is not so tall as Mimi.

questions.question: অনুবাদ: 'আমি যদি পাখি হতাম!' → Exclamatory → Assertive
options: I wish I were a bird.
questions.explanation: 'If I were a bird!' (Exclamatory) → 'I wish I were a bird.' (Assertive)
